scripts.pub-local-core: npm unpublish @clickapp/qui-core@0.0.6 --force --registry http://localhost:4873 && npm run build -w @clickapp/qui-core && npm publish -w @clickapp/qui-core --registry http://localhost:4873
scripts.pub-local-bs: npm unpublish @clickapp/qui-bootstrap@0.0.7  --registry http://localhost:4873 && npm run build -w @clickapp/qui-bootstrap && npm publish -w @clickapp/qui-bootstrap --registry http://localhost:4873
scripts.pub-local-supabase: npm unpublish @clickapp/qui-supabase@0.0.6 --force  --registry http://localhost:4873 && npm run build -w @clickapp/qui-supabase && npm publish -w @clickapp/qui-supabase --registry http://localhost:4873
scripts.pub-local: npm run pub-local-core && npm run pub-local-bs && npm run pub-local-supabase
scripts.build-all: npm run build -w @clickapp/qui-core && npm run build -w @clickapp/qui-bootstrap && npm run build -w @clickapp/qui-supabase
